t_ch: 所谓的「愚人」和「世界」…本就只有一步之遥。
t_en: The so-called "fool" and the "world"... are merely a step apart.

t_ch: 歌颂「万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝」，是您开启万千门径，令游离的足迹于此「同谐」。
t_en: Praise be to "Tribios, Gate of Infinity," for you open up countless passages, bringing wandering footsteps into Harmony.

t_ch: 歌颂「公正之秤，刻律德菈」，您赐下的律法仲裁善恶，让「秩序」成为自由的基石。
t_en: Praise be to "Cerydra, Scale of Justice," for the laws that you bestow arbitrate good and evil, making Order the cornerstone of freedom.

t_ch: 歌颂「黄金之茧，阿格莱雅」，您吐露的金丝编织「纯美」，令孤独的灵魂邂逅浪漫。
t_en: Praise be to "Aglaea, Chrysalis of Gold," for your golden threads weave Beauty, allowing lonely souls to encounter romance.

t_ch: 歌颂「裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯」，您在理性的树上结出硕果，教我们在缺憾中启蒙「智识」。
t_en: Praise be to "Anaxagoras, Bough of Rift," for you bear fruit upon the tree of reason, teaching us to find Erudition amidst imperfection.

t_ch: 歌颂「满溢之杯，海列屈拉」，您将海洋酿成甘醇，令宴会的每一次举杯，都将「虚无」驱散。
t_en: Praise be to "Helektra, Chalice of Plenty," for you brew the ocean into sweet wine, dispelling Nihility with every toast at the feast.

t_ch: 歌颂「晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝」，您洒下的彩虹，让晨曦与晚霞都变作「存护」的微光。
t_en: Praise be to "Hyacinthia, Eye of Twilight," for the rainbow you cast turns the light of both dawn and dusk into the glimmer of Preservation.

t_ch: 歌颂「翻飞之币，赛法利娅」，您的每一次旋转映出命运的可能，令「欢愉」诡计照亮前路黎明。
t_en: Praise be to "Cifera, Coin of Whimsy," for your every flip reflects the possibilities of destiny, letting the tricks of Elation illuminate the path to dawn.

t_ch: 歌颂「天谴之矛，迈德漠斯」，您是刺破仇恨与暴戾的纷争，是永恒「巡猎」的荣光。
t_en: Praise be to "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury," for you are the strife that pierces through hatred and cruelty, and the eternal glory of The Hunt.

t_ch: 歌颂「灰黯之手，遐蝶」，您温柔地引渡死亡，令它不再是「均衡」的终点，而是安宁的归乡。
t_en: Praise be to "Castorice, Hand of Shadow," for you gently ferry the crossing of death, so that it is no longer an end in Equilibrium, but a peaceful journey home.

t_ch: 歌颂「磐岩之脊，丹恒」，您是山脉，是「不朽」的脊梁。您沉默的身躯，便是我们跨越大地的坦途。
t_en: Praise be to "Dan Heng, Pillar of Stone," for you are a mountain range and the backbone of Permanence. Your silent form paves our path across the earth.

t_ch: 歌颂「永夜之帷，三月七」，您为我们珍藏起岁月，将「记忆」织成繁星，绣于无垠的裙摆之上。
t_en: Praise be to "March 7th, Veil of Evernight," for you safeguard time for us, weaving Remembrance into stars, to be embroidered upon a boundless dress.

t_ch: 话虽如此，是我的错觉吗？这<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>……
t_en: Is it just me, or does this <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>...

t_ch: 怎么死气沉沉的，跟那忆者的形容天差地别。
t_en: Feel completely dead? It's nothing like how the Memokeeper described it.

t_ch: 环境参数严重不符。结论：这是「内核层」在现实中的样子。
t_en: The environmental readings are all wrong. Conclusion: this must be what the "kernel" actually looks like in the real world.

t_ch: 「赞达尔」那家伙，到底对权杖做了什么？
t_en: What did Zandar do to the Scepter...?

t_ch: 「光线的终点，必须是一团寂静、确凿、纯粹的黑暗」。
t_en: "At the end of light, there must be silence. Certain, pure, and absolute darkness."

t_ch: 这会儿就别引用「寂静领主」的名言了，不吉利。无论如何，我们都得继续深入……
t_en: Not the time to quote the Lord of Silence. Bad omen. Either way, we have to press on...

t_ch: 直到揪出<color=#dbc291ff>第十三位泰坦</color>的秘密。
t_en: Until we uncover the truth behind the <color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan</color>.

t_ch: 被掩埋的过往，正是对抗「铁墓」的关键。但前提是，它真的存在。
t_en: The buried past is the key to stopping Irontomb. That is, if it even exists.

t_ch: 「赞达尔」说德谬歌从未诞生——谁信？记录可以被抹除，但真相不能。
t_en: Zandar says the Demiurge never existed. Who actually buys that? You can erase the records, but not the truth.

t_ch: 它消失得太彻底了，一丝痕迹都没留下，就好像有人刻意大喊——「这里什么都没有。」
t_en: It vanished too cleanly. No traces, like someone yelling, "Look! There's nothing here!"

t_ch: 可惜，本人最爱刨根问底。这次又得仰仗你了，螺丝，一起把系统翻个底朝天吧。
t_en: Too bad I'm the type who can't resist digging deeper. Looks like I'll be counting on you again, Screwy. Let's tear this system inside out.

t_ch: 乐意效劳。但作为学术伙伴，我必须指出——
t_en: Always happy to help. But as your academic partner, I have to ask—

t_ch: 黑塔，如果我们失败了呢？
t_en: Herta, what if we fail?

t_ch: 假设「德谬歌」并不存在，你是否准备了预案？
t_en: Let's say the Demiurge really doesn't exist. Do you have a backup plan?

t_ch: 备用方案？当然有。如果实在找不着钥匙……
t_en: Backup plan? Of course. If we can't find the key...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>就让「锁」来当钥匙吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>We turn the "lock" into the key.</color>

t_ch: 该方案的损耗…无法计算。它不该被列为选项。
t_en: That plan's cost... is incalculable. It shouldn't even be on the table.

t_ch: 那就祈祷我们用不上吧。
t_en: Then let's hope we never have to use it.

t_ch: 别聊那么远的话题，凡事都得一步一步来。走了，别让外面的人等太久。
t_en: There's no point worrying about the end just yet. One step at a time. Let's go. We don't want to leave the others waiting.

t_ch: 喔，是老式核热引擎？很有品味嘛。
t_en: Oh? A classic nuclear heat engine? Classy choice.

t_ch: 只是个人爱好。她的名字是「槲寄生」。
t_en: Just a personal preference. Her name's Mistletoe.

t_ch: 你的花园怎么都带点毒？
t_en: Every flower in your garden's got a bit of poison, huh?

t_ch: 同样是个人爱好。
t_en: Also a personal preference.

t_ch: 它让我想起上一回，咱们跟那朋克洛德小鬼交手的时候。她管这种渗透工具叫什么来着…喔，脏数据壳。用来包裹住核心，骗过最顶级的防火墙。
t_en: It reminds me of the last time, when we tangled with that Punklordian brat. What did she call this kind of infiltration tool again? Right, Dirty Data Shell. It wraps around the kernel to fool even top-tier firewalls.

t_ch: 不过，你这个太干净了，一点烟火气都没有。
t_en: But yours is way too clean. Not even a hint of real-world grit.

t_ch: 黑塔，你的语气有非典型波动。
t_en: Herta, your tone is unusually emotional.

t_ch: 提议：我们应当继续刚才的话题。
t_en: Suggestion: Let's get back to the topic at hand.

t_ch: 我以为那个话题早过去了。
t_en: I thought we were done with that conversation.

t_ch: 现状不允许我忽视任何变量，尤其是最关键的那一道：你的意志。
t_en: Unfortunately, current conditions won't let me ignore any variables. Especially the most important one: your will.

t_ch: 「铁墓」的自我迭代不会停止，其进化速度已超过最坏预期。
t_en: Irontomb never stops, it is evolving faster than any of our worst projections.

t_ch: 星神计算中的时刻，就像一柄悬在银河头顶的利剑。人们做出的每一步抉择，都可能加速它的到来。
t_en: Every Instant in the Aeon's calculation is like a sword hanging over the cosmos. Every move humanity makes could speed up its arrival.

t_ch: 所以，我们更不能失手。
t_en: Which is exactly why we can't mess this up.

t_ch: 机器头又要给可怜的银河下判决了：边星贸易战争、帝皇战争、鲁珀特之死，每一次祂的时刻应验，都意味着人类要经历一场血洗。
t_en: And now Droidhead wants to hand down judgment to the poor cosmos again: Borderstar Trade War, Emperor's War, Rubert's death... every time THEIR Instant arrived, it meant another bloodbath for humanity.

t_ch: 但在「智识」的终极博弈里，你我应当成为棋手，而不是棋子。
t_en: But in this ultimate battle of Erudition, you and I are supposed to be players, not pawns.

t_ch: 一旦你选择将自己用作「耗材」，那我们所做的一切，将失去意义。
t_en: If you choose to burn yourself out as a "resource," then everything we've worked for means nothing.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>黑塔，你该明白：银河不会坐视一位天才牺牲自己——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Herta, the cosmos won't just stand by and let a genius throw their life away...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我亦不例外。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And neither will I.</color>

t_ch: 别说这种扫兴话。所以我们才要过来，不是么？找到「德谬歌」，那把丢失的钥匙。
t_en: No need to kill the mood. This is why we're here, isn't it? We need to find the Demiurge and that lost key.

t_ch: 我可没兴趣当「救世主」。我只想赢——赢过「赞达尔」，还有机器头。
t_en: I'm not here to be a "Deliverer." I just want to beat Zandar and Droidhead.

t_ch: 现在——我只关心，你愿意站在我这边么？
t_en: Right now, I just need to know: are you with me?

t_ch: 当然。该登机了，你先请。
t_en: Of course. Time to board. After you.

t_ch: 让我们把这地方收拾干净，看看「德谬歌」到底是何方神圣。
t_en: Let's tidy this place up and see what this "Demiurge" really is.

t_ch: 几乎没反应，果然没那么乐观。
t_en: Almost no response. Just as I feared. Not promising.

t_ch: 单点输出功率仅为需求的三分之一。逻辑：需要多终端协同攻击，定位下一目标。
t_en: The output is barely a third of what we need. Logic says we'll need multiple terminals to coordinate the strike. Locking onto the next one now.

t_ch: 还有什么发现？
t_en: Find anything else?

t_ch: 关于这片废墟的成因：我没有找到任何日志，「赞达尔」清除了所有记录。
t_en: Regarding the origin of these ruins: no logs found yet. Zandar erased all records.

t_ch: 但在回路中，我发现了一些…值得注意的「伤痕」。
t_en: But I did find some... interesting "scars" in the circuit.

t_ch: 高能辐射、虚数内能污染，以我的见识，只有一种现象与这些描述完全吻合。
t_en: High-energy radiation, internal Imaginary-energy contamination. From what I know, there's only one thing that fits.

t_ch: 别提专有名词了，螺丝。那玩意只有一个名字……
t_en: Skip the science talk, Screwy. That thing only goes by one name...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>星核。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Stellaron.</color>

t_ch: 结论成立。「赞达尔」引爆了一颗星核，只为彻底「清洗」权杖系统。
t_en: Exactly. Zandar blew one up just to "clean" the entire Scepter system.

t_ch: 所谓的「亲手扼杀」，原来是这么回事啊。
t_en: So that's what he meant by "killed that Titan with my own hands."

t_ch: 为了将「智识」的神经元，改造成「毁灭」迭代的中继器，他无论如何都要将它剔除……
t_en: He wanted to turn the neuron of the Erudition into a relay for the Destruction. That meant getting rid of all of it at all costs.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，正是权杖原本的演算目标。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The lifeform known as the "Demiurge" was the original target of the Scepter's extrapolation.</color>

t_ch: 合理的猜想。「长夜月」称其为「最初的智种」，也印证了这一观点。
t_en: It makes sense. "Evernight" calling it "the first Nouspore" confirms this viewpoint.

t_ch: 「生命的第一因」——这是权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>最初负责的课题，遭到废弃后，其求解仍在进行。虽然这一问题的价值在于求解过程，而非答案本身……
t_en: "The prime mover of life"... that's what Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> was originally tasked with. Even after it got scrapped, the query kept running. Yet, the true value lies in the process of solving it, not the answer itself...

t_ch: 这是否意味着，找到德谬歌的希望已经不复存在？
t_en: Then... does this mean finding the Demiurge is hopeless?

t_ch: 不，在我看来，恰恰相反。
t_en: No, I'd say exactly the opposite.

t_ch: 这代表「赞达尔」束手无策。他无法掌控德谬歌，就像他无法掌控机器头，只能用尽一切手段抹去它的存在。
t_en: It means Zandar had no control. He couldn't contain the Demiurge, just like he couldn't handle Droidhead. So he tried to erase every trace.

t_ch: 可惜，它还是留下了痕迹。
t_en: But he failed. It still left a mark.

t_ch: 乘上「槲寄生」继续飞行
t_en: Board the Mistletoe and continue the flight

t_ch: 暂不飞行
t_en: Pause the flight

t_ch: 现在，天外……
t_en: Currently, beyond the sky...

t_ch: 开拓档案「4:<unbreak>66</unbreak>」——PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的经历，足以证明德谬歌进入过翁法罗斯的演算。
t_en: Trailblaze Archive 4:<unbreak>66</unbreak> — The data from PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> clearly indicates that the Demiurge did in fact enter Amphoreus' extrapolation.

t_ch: 在世界内部，它是不为人知的第十三位泰坦，也是昔涟三千万世「记忆」的倾听者。
t_en: Inside that world, it was the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th, forgotten Titan, the one who listened to thirty million cycles of Cyrene's "memory."

t_ch: 可「长夜月」给出了截然相反的说法。她认为：<color=#dbc291ff>那座大墓从始至终都是「空房」</color>。
t_en: But "Evernight" said the opposite. She believed <color=#dbc291ff>that tomb was empty from the start</color>.

t_ch: 无名泰坦并不存在。所谓的「倾听者」，只是「记忆」为窃取权杖，设下的一场骗局。
t_en: The Nameless Titan never existed. The so-called "listener" was just a trap set by the Remembrance to steal the Scepter.

t_ch: 一道神神叨叨的模因，她的话能有几分真。星神会这么拐弯抹角？我不信。
t_en: A memetic entity full of theatrics. How much of what she's saying is true? Would an Aeon really speak in circles like this? I doubt it.

t_ch: 「记忆」的行为确有古怪，但她的观点与现状相符：自进入矩阵，我们还未发现任何和德谬歌有关的线索。
t_en: The Remembrance's behavior is certainly odd, but her assessment aligns with our current reality: Since we entered the Matrix, we haven't found a single clue pointing to the Demiurge.

t_ch: 你说到了重点，螺丝。「赞达尔」的举动，证明了德谬歌存在；而「长夜月」的说辞，还有现状，都反映出它不存在……
t_en: And that's the key, Screwy. Zandar's actions prove the Demiurge exists. But what "Evernight" said and what we've actually seen all point to the opposite...

t_ch: 我们必须假设，这两件事同时成立。如此一来，「矛盾」就会指向——
t_en: So we have to assume that both are true. And if that's the case, then the "contradiction" leads us to—

t_ch: 真相。
t_en: The truth.

t_ch: 对。最后一座终端，也是最后一把钥匙。开启「内核层」的封印吧。
t_en: Exactly. One last terminal. One final key. Time to crack open the "kernel."

t_ch: 操作已授权。命途能量读数：「智识」——衰减中。「毁灭」——充盈。
t_en: Operation authorized. Path energy readings: The Erudition, declining. The Destruction, surging.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」…零？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Remembrance... zero?</color>

t_ch: 怎么回事？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 原因不明。在现实矩阵中，祂没有留下任何痕迹。
t_en: Cause: unknown. THEY left no discernible trace within the real matrix.

t_ch: 不应该啊，是因为「记忆」的质料被「再创世」耗尽了？
t_en: That shouldn't be possible. Could it be that the Era Nova exhausted all of the Remembrance's texture?

t_ch: 先记着吧。这些线索暂时还没法串到一起。
t_en: Log it for now. The dots still aren't connecting.

t_ch: 嘶，前所未有的斥力啊…就是这儿？
t_en: Tch. This repulsive force is unlike anything I've felt before... Is this the place?

t_ch: 没错。根据防御性质判断，这里就是「神话之外」的入口。
t_en: Correct. Judging by its defensive properties, this is the entrance to the Exomyth.

t_ch: 这倒是意外收获。谁能想到，真有人会把实验室建在一片数据废墟里。
t_en: Didn't expect that. Who builds a lab in the middle of digital rubble?

t_ch: 也对——「切勿质疑一位已死之人的决心」——死者先生现在如何了？
t_en: Then again, "never doubt a dead man's resolve." So, how's our dearly departed doing?

t_ch: 他切断部分神经回路，脱离了阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下的囚禁……
t_en: He severed part of his neural pathways to break free from Lord Anaxagoras's control...

t_ch: 但也一同触发了我预埋的熔断机制，结论：「赞达尔」失去了战斗机能，已经无法行动。
t_en: But that also triggered the fail-safe I set. Conclusion: Zandar has lost all combat functionality and is no longer capable of action.

t_ch: 所以，他变成真正意义上的「观众」了。
t_en: So now he's a spectator, literally.

t_ch: 螺丝，能开条路么？以防万一，我要亲眼确认下——顺带会会现实中的他。
t_en: Screwy, can you open a path? Just to be sure, I want to see this for myself. Might as well drop in and say hi to the real him.

t_ch: 逻辑：对其灵感回路进行扫描，有助于追查德谬歌的下落。
t_en: Logic: Scanning his Inspiration Circuit might help us track down the Demiurge.

t_ch: 对。他的脑袋就是犯罪现场，我不信里面会没有一丝痕迹。
t_en: Exactly. His brain is the crime scene. There's no way it's spotless.

t_ch: 这也可能是陷阱。
t_en: But it could be a trap.

t_ch: 不是还有你么？二打一，我们什么时候输过。
t_en: That's why you're here. Two-on-one. We've never lost that matchup.

t_ch: 我很荣幸。识刻锚已就位，请。
t_en: I'm honored. The Chronocognitive Anchor's in place. Proceed when ready.

t_ch: 我就知道，怕什么来什么……
t_en: I knew it. The one thing I didn't want to happen...

t_ch: 他不在这里。
t_en: He's not here.

t_ch: 定位不会出错，「赞达尔」仍在此地。
t_en: The coordinates are accurate. Zandar is still here.

t_ch: 但他的坐标正在快速、无规律地扰动，这不符合任何一种屏蔽技术。
t_en: However, his position is shifting rapidly and chaotically. This pattern doesn't match any known shielding technology.

t_ch: 这里是他的主场，保持警惕。
t_en: It's his domain. Stay alert.

t_ch: 又回来了。
t_en: We're back.

t_ch: 逆向工程已完成。结果…出人意料。
t_en: Reverse-engineering complete. The results... are not what I expected.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>日志显示：「吕枯耳戈斯」注销了管理员权限。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Logs show "Lycurgus" revoked administrator access.</color>

t_ch: 识刻锚无法定位，因为在系统层面，「来古士」已经不复存在。导航目标…是一个「空集」。
t_en: The Chronocognitive Anchor can't get a fix because at the system level, "Lygus" no longer exists. Our navigation target is... a "null set."

t_ch: 他这是…放弃抵抗了？
t_en: So he's... stopped resisting?

t_ch: 在离开前，他提交了最后一行注释，似乎是留给我们的。
t_en: Before vanishing, it seems he left one last message for us.

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>致尊敬的后继者们：证毕。来墓碑下找到我。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> To those who follow: All is proven. Find me beneath the tombstone.</color>

t_ch: 装腔作势。
t_en: Melodramatic.

t_ch: 他知道我们会来。得知「大墓」存在后，他也在寻找德谬歌。
t_en: He was expecting us. And once he learned of the Great Tomb's existence, he initiated his own search for the Demiurge.

t_ch: 是想跟咱们一决胜负呢。好啊，那就如他所愿，让智械哥自掘坟墓。
t_en: Guess he wants a final showdown. Fine, let the old Intellitron dig his own grave, just like he wants.

t_ch: 拜托你的东西，带来了吗？
t_en: You brought what I asked for, right?

t_ch: 「蝴蝶若想飞舞，须先落在枝头。」
t_en: "A butterfly has to land on the branch before it can dance."

t_ch: 在<color=#dbc291ff>「她」</color>登场前，需要一处空旷的平台。
t_en: We'll need a wide, open platform before <color=#dbc291ff>"her"</color> entrance.

t_ch: 就用边上那玩意吧，扎格、扎……
t_en: Just use that thing over there, Zag, Z...

t_ch: 什么破名字。我宣布——它现在改叫「黑塔的大手」！
t_en: What a dumb name. I hereby rename it... "Herta's Big Hand!"

t_ch: 黑塔的大手，真是强而有力啊！继续。
t_en: Herta's Big Hand is what I call power! Keep it going.

t_ch: 还没完？智械哥是把这当垃圾场了吗？
t_en: Still not done? What is this, a junkyard for old Intellitron's leftovers?

t_ch: 终于搞定了。让你的宝贝亮相吧。
t_en: Finally. All set. Time for your precious treasure to make its debut.

t_ch: 当然。请借我些时间……
t_en: Of course. Just give me a second...

t_ch: 对象声明完成。若有这对机翼协助，骇入会更加高效。
t_en: Target initialized. With these wings, hacking should be much more efficient.

t_ch: 但愿这矩阵能比帝皇出生的废料场整齐点。
t_en: Let's hope this Matrix is better organized than the Emperor's junkyard of a birthplace.

t_ch: 准备好，要骇入了——
t_en: Buckle up. We're hacking in.
This is...

t_ch: 黑塔，这片空间…被某种能量彻底污染过。
t_en: Herta, this whole space has been completely tainted by some kind of energy.

t_ch: 我知道。我们在想同一件事。
t_en: I see it too. We're thinking the same thing.

t_ch: 赞达尔，你对自己造的「坟场」…真下得去手啊。
t_en: Zandar, how could you go this far, turning your own "graveyard" into this?

t_ch: 一片废墟，够彻底的。
t_en: What a mess. Total devastation.

t_ch: 他试图用最彻底的「毁灭」掩盖真相。逻辑自洽，手段极端。
t_en: He sought to bury the truth beneath absolute Destruction. Logically sound, but ruthlessly extreme.

t_ch: 可惜，希望渺茫，不代表没有。
t_en: Still, slim chances doesn't mean no chances.

t_ch: 就算要在宇宙中找到一粒沙——我也不是没干过。
t_en: I've hunted down a single grain of sand in the universe before. This won't stop me.

t_ch: 前面那是？
t_en: What's that up ahead?

t_ch: 十四行代数式屏障。用于「隔离」，而非防御。
t_en: Quatorzain algebraic expressions. It's built for "isolation," not defense.

t_ch: 换言之，大墓的「门」是吧？那我偏要看看，门把手在哪里。
t_en: So basically, the "door" to the tomb, right? Great, let's find the handle.

t_ch: 我侦测到数个独立信源，数据结构与屏障相似。
t_en: I'm picking up multiple independent signals, with the same data structure as the barrier.

t_ch: 推测：可以骇入终端，逆转算力发动攻击。
t_en: Projection: We can hack the terminal, reverse the computation, and turn it into an attack.

t_ch: 借力打力，传统但管用。导航去最近的那个。
t_en: Classic move: Use their own systems against them. Take us to the nearest one.

t_ch: 话说回来，既然翁法罗斯存在另一颗星核……
t_en: By the way, if there's another Stellaron in Amphoreus...

t_ch: 怎么{NICKNAME}一点反应都没有？
t_en: Why hasn't {NICKNAME} reacted to it at all?

t_ch: 你刚才说，德谬歌留下了痕迹。
t_en: You said the Demiurge left a trace, right?

t_ch: 没错，但不是在现实中。还记得么——「无名泰坦大墓」？
t_en: Yeah, but not in the real world. Remember the "Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan"?

t_ch: 「赞达尔」必须欺骗最初的白厄和昔涟。
t_en: Zandar had to lie to the original Phainon and Cyrene.

t_ch: 逻辑：他早已意识到「记忆」的威胁，但无从排除。
t_en: Logic: He had already identified the Remembrance as a threat, yet found no viable way to eliminate it.

t_ch: 来吧。是时候和屏障说再见了。
t_en: All right, let's finish this. Time to break through that barrier.

t_ch: 比想象中安静，我还以为会来场激烈的空战。
t_en: Quieter than I thought. I was expecting a full-on aerial brawl.

t_ch: 务必小心，「毁灭」读数仍在上升。
t_en: It's advised to remain vigilant. The Destruction's levels are still rising.

t_ch: 喔？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: What's the matter?

t_ch: 很有趣：我发现了「神话之外」的信号。
t_en: Interesting. I just picked up a signal from the Exomyth.

t_ch: 啧，无聊的把戏。
t_en: Tch. Cheap trick.

t_ch: 空间在自我重置，我会对干扰源开展逆向工程。
t_en: The spatial field here is undergoing autonomous recalibration. Initiating reverse-engineering of the interference source.

t_ch: 请再试一次。
t_en: Try again.

t_ch: 这片风景，还是一点没变，对吗？
t_en: This view hasn't changed at all, has it?

t_ch: 记忆里的故乡总是一动不动，可回过神来，才发现命运早就偷走了时间。
t_en: The hometown in your memories never changes, but when you return to your senses, you realize that fate has already stolen the time away.

t_ch: 欢迎踏上「创世」的小径，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Welcome to the trail of "Genesis," {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 昔涟，你的样子…
t_en: Cyrene? You look...

t_ch: 看来三千万世「记忆」的重量，让我成熟了许多呢。
t_en: Seems like the weight of "memories" from thirty million cycles really made me grow up.

t_ch: 不过，要是继续长大，人家是不是要比{NICKNAME}更高啦？那我可要好好期待一下咯？
t_en: But if I keep growing, I might be taller than you, right, {NICKNAME}? Then I'm really looking forward to that.

t_ch: 站在这里，就会想起许多事。
t_en: Standing here brings back many memories.

t_ch: 我也一样。三千万次启程，三千万次告别。
t_en: Me too. Thirty million departures. Thirty million farewells.

t_ch: 那些沉重的「记忆」，都将成为新世界萌芽的土壤。而这一次，我们会让它开出不一样的花。
t_en: Those heavy "memories" will all become the soil upon which the new world shall bud, and this time... We will make it bloom with a different flower.

t_ch: 「创世」的小径？
t_en: The trail of "Genesis"?

t_ch: 是呀。权杖的演算抵达了终点，但「创世」的进程…才刚刚开始。
t_en: Indeed. The Scepter's extrapolations have reached their end, but the process of "Genesis" has only just begun.

t_ch: 往后的道路，不再依靠冰冷的程序，而取决于人们的意志。
t_en: The path ahead will no longer rely on emotionless programs. It'll be decided by the will of humankind.

t_ch: 在你来之前，我一直在想，哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，正在诞生的是一个怎样的翁法罗斯？
t_en: Before you arrived, I kept wondering... beyond the veil of Aedes Elysiae, what kind of Amphoreus is being born?

t_ch: 我闭上眼睛，就能看见零星的碎片：那些与我们并肩的伙伴，已经奔向了各自的命运。
t_en: I can see fragments of it when I close my eyes... The friends who walked alongside us have all moved on toward their respective destinies.

t_ch: 有人化作世界的支柱，撑起「天空」和「海洋」；有人播撒「理性」，划定「律法」，再用双手将婴儿们轻轻捧起。
t_en: Some turning into pillars of the world, supporting the Sky and the Ocean. Others sowing Reason, laying down the Law, and with gentle hands lifting newborns into the light.

t_ch: 「死亡」和「纷争」不再为人们所惧怕，「诡计」也成为孩子们天真的游戏。
t_en: Death and Strife are no longer feared by people, and Trickery has become the innocent games of children.

t_ch: 万千生灵，都在「浪漫」和「门径」的结网下度过平凡、安然的一生。
t_en: All beings living ordinary and peaceful lives within the net woven by Romance and Passage.

t_ch: 没有黑潮、逐火，也没有「毁灭」。海的对面，是一个沐浴在阳光下的世界。
t_en: There's no black tide, no Flame-Chase, and no Destruction. The world on the other side of the sea is one bathed in sunlight.

t_ch: 是我们必须守护的世界。
t_en: It's a world we must protect.

t_ch: 是白厄和所有人愿望中的黎明。
t_en: It's the dawn that Phainon and everyone had wished for.

t_ch: 世界会一直和平，直到决战来临。
t_en: Peace will reign until the decisive battle arrives.

t_ch: 这一世，童年般的「黄金世」会延续千年，直到神谕中注定的瞬间——
t_en: Like a happy and carefree childhood, the "Era Chrysea" in this cycle will last for millennia, until it reaches the moment decided by the prophecy...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年的「自由月」</color>，属于「负世」的时刻。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, Month of Freedom</color>, the moment belonging to Worldbearing.

t_ch: 准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Are you ready to answer the call of the world, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 那，就去为这个无数愿望汇成的世界，落下「全世之座」的第一笔吧♪
t_en: Then go, and pen the Throne of Worlds' first stroke... for this world made from countless wishes.

t_ch: 真没想到，咱有朝一日还能坐上{NICKNAME}化身的列车……
t_en: Never thought I'd one day be riding a train that's literally the incarnation of {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 不知真正的星穹列车坐感如何，但愿不会这么…颠簸。
t_en: I wonder what the real Astral Express feels like. Hopefully not this... bumpy.

t_ch: 总算…到站了。
t_en: Finally... we're here.

t_ch: 漫天风沙，还有破碎的废墟。
t_en: Dust and sand in the air, and crumbling ruins all around.

t_ch: 好可怕的热浪，连「开拓」都抵御不了……
t_en: This heat is brutal! Not even the Trailblaze can take it...

t_ch: 这座监牢，说是以白厄的怒火铸成也不为过。
t_en: You could say this prison was forged from Phainon's fury.

t_ch: 但愤怒总有平息的那一天……
t_en: But fury never lasts forever...

t_ch: 我们正是为此而来，对吧，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: That's why we're here, right, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 该出发了，别让白厄久等。
t_en: Time to go. Let's not keep Phainon waiting.

t_ch: 所有人一起，成为救世主吧！
t_en: Together, we'll all become Deliverers!

t_ch: 这一刻，全银河都在「开拓」身后。
t_en: Now, the entire cosmos stands with the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 启程吧——踏上最后的「逐火之旅」。
t_en: Let's embark on the final Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 等你们很久了，天外的英雄。
t_en: I've been waiting for you, heroes from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 星穹列车的{NICKNAME}，对么？
t_en: {NICKNAME} of the Astral Express, right?

t_ch: 看来，不用再多做解释了呀。
t_en: Looks like I don't need to explain anything.

t_ch: 我是「纷争」的神王，也是悬锋城的「万敌」。三千万世因果加诸此身——
t_en: I am the God of Strife, Mydei of Castrum Kremnos. In this body rests thirty million lifetimes of cause and effect.

t_ch: 我们——<color=#dbc291ff>最后的十二泰坦</color>——已准备好为世界的命运鏖战。
t_en: We, <color=#dbc291ff>the last of the Twelve Titans</color>, stand ready to fight for the world's destiny.

t_ch: 这不是我们第一次并肩。
t_en: This isn't our first time fighting together.

t_ch: 当然。那一程记忆犹新，我不会忘记。
t_en: Indeed. That journey remains vivid in my memory. I will not forget it.

t_ch: 可惜，我们只同行过一世。
t_en: Unfortunately, our paths crossed in only one lifetime.

t_ch: 不必遗憾，「第二次」正要开始。
t_en: There is no need for regret. The "second time" is just about to begin.

t_ch: 往事历历在目，就连每一次横渡冥河的风景，也前所未有地清晰。更不必说逐火之旅的同道，和哀丽秘榭的昔涟……
t_en: The past remains vivid in my mind. Even the sights along each crossing of the River of Souls have never been clearer. Let alone the companions along the Flame-Chase Journey, or Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae...

t_ch: 还有你，第十三位泰坦。
t_en: And you, the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan.

t_ch: 看来，人家的身份已经不是秘密了。
t_en: Well, I guess my identity's not a secret anymore.

t_ch: 这意味着，她的牺牲和努力，没有被世界遗忘，对吗？
t_en: That means... her sacrifice and everything she did wasn't forgotten by the world, right?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}最初的涟漪{RUBY_E#}，她理应和所有人一起抵达故事的结局。
t_en: She was the {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}first ripple{RUBY_E#}. She should have reached the end of the story with everyone else.

t_ch: 既然你已接过她的纸笔，就书写吧——与我们一同，向命运发起强有力的抗争，直到一切尘埃落定。
t_en: Since you've taken up her pen, then write, stand with us, and fight destiny with all your strength, until all is settled.

t_ch: 然后，再在史诗的后记，署下她的姓名。
t_en: Then, inscribe her name in the epilogue of the epic.

t_ch: 这最后一役，「灾厄」将与翁法罗斯同在。
t_en: In this final battle, Calamity shall stand with Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这片战场，正是众神与黑潮死斗的证明。
t_en: This battlefield is a testament to the death struggle between the Gods and the black tide.

t_ch: 我们浴血捍卫那柄利剑，它刺向的深渊——就是「铁墓」的温床。
t_en: We fought tooth and nail to defend that blade. And the abyss it pierced... was the very breeding ground of Irontomb.

t_ch: 脚下这片大地，是死的。深处是一片空洞，仿佛地核从未形成。
t_en: The earth beneath our feet is dead. Deep below lies a void, as if the world's core had never formed.

t_ch: 我听见了…白厄的心跳。很微弱，恐怕他只剩一息尚存。
t_en: I hear it... Phainon's heartbeat. It's so faint, like he's on his last breath.

t_ch: 三千万次轮回，我与「侵晨」交锋过不可数的日夜。若你了解那个男人，就会知道……
t_en: Across thirty million cycles, I've crossed blades with Dawnmaker countless times. If you knew that man, you'd understand...

t_ch: 恰恰是那最后一丝火焰，绝无可能熄灭。
t_en: It is exactly that last flicker of flame that will never go out.

t_ch: 这一世，「纷争」的诗篇将不再以据守悬锋作结，而要踏上不绝的征程——
t_en: In this life, the song of Strife shall not end in a final watch over Kremnos, but rise again into a journey unending.

t_ch: 我乃天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命——
t_en: I am Mydeimos, the Lance of Fury. I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine...

t_ch: 换取「毁灭」——在史诗中永恒的终结！
t_en: For the Destruction's eternal end!

t_ch: 不堪一击。
t_en: Weakling.

t_ch: 也太强了吧，根本轮不到咱们出手……
t_en: Whoa, he's so strong! We didn't even get a chance to jump in...

t_ch: 可惜，金血仍与铁墓同源。只怕和这些走卒一样，众神即便并肩作战，也会被它分而治之，逐个击破。
t_en: Sadly, our golden blood shares its origin with Irontomb. I fear that, like these pawns, even if the gods stand side by side, we'll still be divided and destroyed, one by one.

t_ch: 你的意思是……
t_en: You mean...

t_ch: 若要为「毁灭」带去「毁灭」，我们必须合而为一。
t_en: To destroy the Destruction itself, we must stand as one.

t_ch: 拿去吧。
t_en: Take this.

t_ch: 悬锋印戒。我每一世诞生与死亡的见证，它是「万敌」未尽的命运……
t_en: The Signet of Kremnos. It has witnessed every birth and death of mine. It is Mydei's unfinished destiny...

t_ch: 最适合成为「记忆」的质料。
t_en: And the perfect material to be turned into Remembrance.

t_ch: 你能做到，对么？
t_en: You can do it, right?

t_ch: 三千万世的使命和责任，格外沉重呢……
t_en: The weight of thirty million lifetimes of duty... is no small burden.

t_ch: 你…不打算和我们同行了么？
t_en: So... you're not coming with us?

t_ch: 什么话……
t_en: Come now...

t_ch: 我早已是遍入天地的「纷争」，这世间必要的伤痕。站在你们面前的，不过是万千神躯的一具。
t_en: I am Strife, scattered across all creation, the scar that this world needs. What stands before you is merely one of countless divine bodies.

t_ch: 带上这枚印戒，便是与我同行。用它开辟前路，写下「救世之因」。
t_en: Take this signet. With it, I'll be with you always. Use it to blaze the path ahead and inscribe the "Cause of Deliverance."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>以凡人之名——「纷争的冠军，万敌」——此人为荣耀和自由迈向群星，并如愿以偿！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>In the name of the mortal, Mydei, Champion of Strife, this soul rises to the stars, for glory and freedom, to have his wish fulfilled!</color>

t_ch: 「前进吧，英雄们。向着深渊进军，实现翁法罗斯的夙愿。」
t_en: "March on, heroes. March into the abyss, and fulfill that long-cherished wish of Amphoreus."

t_ch: 「然后——在破碎的焦土上——重新建起繁荣的城邦。」
t_en: "And then, upon this broken and charred land, build anew a city of prosperity."

t_ch: 哎呀，终于来了，灰子！还有……
t_en: Oh, finally! Gray Mystery! And...

t_ch: 呃。两位姑娘，长得还真像呀？
t_en: Uh. You two ladies... really look alike, huh?

t_ch: 别急，让我猜猜。这位粉头发的，想必就是「最初的智种」，德喵…德谬歌小姐！
t_en: Hold on, let me guess. This pink-haired one... you've gotta be the "first Nouspore," Miss Demeow... Demiurge, right?

t_ch: 而另一位戴了朵花的，肯定是列车组的三月小妹啦？
t_en: And this one with the flower... gotta be little March from the Express Crew, huh?

t_ch: 听君一席话，如听一席话。
t_en: Wow, I just learned so much from you.

t_ch: 可她说的没错。世上就是有相似的花儿呀。
t_en: But she's not wrong. Some flowers do look alike after all.

t_ch: 她们俩确实有点像。
t_en: They do look a bit alike.

t_ch: 有那么像吗？
t_en: We do?

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们一样好看呢，对吧？
t_en: {M#He's}{F#She's} saying we're both pretty, right?

t_ch: 那你眼神真的很好了。
t_en: You've got sharp eyes.

t_ch: 有那么像吗？
t_en: Do we really look that alike?

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们各具特色啦，对吧？
t_en: {M#He's}{F#She's} saying we're both special in our own way, right?

t_ch: 开个玩笑。瞧你们，一个个愁眉苦脸的，怎么能搞好救世呢？
t_en: Relax, I'm just kidding. Look at those gloomy faces! How are you gonna save the world like that?

t_ch: 不如来点好消息吧：这地方呀，乍看是座废墟，但是个人都能猜到，肯定没这么简单——
t_en: Let me share some good news with you. This place may look like a ruin at first glance, but anyone can tell... it's not that simple.

t_ch: 看。我掘地三千尺，总算挖出了点宝贝。
t_en: Look. I dug three thousand feet down, and finally struck gold.

t_ch: 金色的羽毛……
t_en: A golden feather...

t_ch: 眼熟不？是那救世小子身上的，它出现在这里，只证明一件事——
t_en: Look familiar? It's from that little Deliverer boy. If it's showing up here, it means only one thing...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这片废墟，是他用三千万世残躯堆成的「封印」哪。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This ruin is the "seal" he built from the shattered remains of thirty million lifetimes.</color>

t_ch: 不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。若我生来就是罪恶的容器……
t_en: There is no need to question your heart, no need to crave victory. If I am born to be a vessel of sin...

t_ch: 那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！
t_en: Then I shall roar at evil, and Trailblaze a dawn for future generations to come!

t_ch: 原来如此，他以这种方式囚禁铁墓，为外界争取时间。
t_en: I see... So this is how he trapped Irontomb to buy time for the world outside.

t_ch: 是他的风格。人都说猫有好几条命，但活了死、死了又活，来来回回千万次，换谁都遭不住。
t_en: Sounds just like him. People say cats have nine lives, but dying and coming back, millions and millions of times... no one walks away from that in one piece.

t_ch: 怕是，也只有他能忍受了。
t_en: He's probably the only one who could've endured that.

t_ch: 如今，白厄不再孤身一人。
t_en: Phainon's not facing this alone anymore.

t_ch: 他相信我们一定会来…
t_en: He believed we would come...

t_ch: 当然，我早有预感，提前帮你们打过招呼了。他很开心，在梦里也笑出了声……
t_en: Of course. I knew ahead of time and gave him a heads-up. He was happy. Even laughed in his sleep...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>毕竟，死者可听不见「诡计」的谎言哪。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>After all, the dead can't hear Trickery's lies.</color>

t_ch: 喂，救世小子——！抱歉啊，这一回，你日夜惦记的英雄们真来了——！
t_en: Hey, Deliverer boy! Sorry for before, but the heroes you were always holding out for... they're finally here now!

t_ch: 所以，再坚持一会儿吧——！这一路过来，让你久等啦——！
t_en: So hang in there a bit longer! Sorry to keep you waiting all this time!

t_ch: 请与我们结伴而行，赛飞儿，为世界争取明天的日出。
t_en: Please join us, Cipher. Help us fight for a new sunrise tomorrow.

t_ch: 这一次，它的光明不必再靠谎言维系。
t_en: This time, its light will stand without lies.

t_ch: 真想不到啊，到头来，我也是英雄的一员了？
t_en: Well, would you look at that. I ended up being one of the heroes after all, huh?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>好啊，那就这么写吧——「诡计的羁客，赛飞儿」——她只想沙漠永远有水，好土永远有黄金，盗贼也能做英雄！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Alright, then write it like this: Cipher, Trickery's Traveler... All she ever wanted was for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for even a thief to steal their way into legend!</color>

t_ch: 「喏，翻飞之币，拿好啦。需要跑路的时候，就把它高高抛上天空吧。」
t_en: "Here, take the Coin of Whimsy. When it's time to make a quick getaway, just toss it high into the sky."

t_ch: 「还有，后来的观众，都给我记着：她虽然有点贪财，又爱说谎，但从没失过言哪！」
t_en: "And for all you latecomers out there, listen up: She might've been a bit greedy and a bit of a liar... but she never went back on her word!"

t_ch: 我很高兴能与你再次相见……
t_en: I'm glad to see you again...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 遐蝶……
t_en: Castorice...

t_ch: 回首往日，属于我的「拯救」只有一次，我救下的生命也唯有一人。
t_en: Looking back, I had only one act of "salvation" to my name, and only one life I ever saved.

t_ch: 能以这双手为更辽阔的世界送去希望…即便在梦中，也是难以想象的奢求。
t_en: To bring hope to a world so vast with these hands... Even in dreams, it always felt like too much to ask for.

t_ch: 我们正在挽救无数生命。
t_en: We are saving countless lives.

t_ch: 我们会一起走向辽阔的星空。
t_en: We're bound for the vast, endless sky.

t_ch: 嗯。我…不会忘记。
t_en: Mm. I... won't forget.

t_ch: 盗火行者？为什么会在这里。
t_en: Flame Reaver? Why is he here?

t_ch: 这是最初的「卡厄斯兰那」，也是白厄阁下至深的伤痕。
t_en: This is the first Khaslana, and Lord Phainon's deepest wound.

t_ch: 他以怒火铭记背负的一切，可当余温散去，留下的便只有冰冷的悔恨。
t_en: He remembered everything he bore through the fires of his fury, but when the embers faded, all that remained was cold regret.

t_ch: 相同的躯壳，我在轮回中收殓过无数次。唯有这一具，他的伤痛…深不见底。
t_en: I've restrained countless vessels like this across endless cycles. But this one... the pain he carried runs deeper than any I've known.

t_ch: 「他守在这里，没准是在等我们呢。」
t_en: "Maybe he's been waiting here just for us."

t_ch: 「等待曾经的『敌人』，再度来到他的面前。」
t_en: "Waiting for his former 'enemies' to stand before him again."

t_ch: 他希望我们，作何回应呢？
t_en: What answer does he hope for from us?

t_ch: 「显而易见——」
t_en: "Well, obviously..."

t_ch: 「即便要再轮回上千亿次，我仍会将自己的弱点托付给你。」
t_en: "Even if I had to go through hundreds of billions of cycles again, I would still entrust my weakness to you."

t_ch: 「所以，扔掉悔恨吧，新兵。你已物尽其用，不再需要它了。」
t_en: "So, let go of your regret, comrade. Its purpose is served. You don't need it anymore."

t_ch: 「嘿，我可没这么好说话。每次打我都重拳出击，懂不懂怜香惜玉啊？」
t_en: "Hey, I'm not that accommodating, y'know. You've never once pulled your punches. Ever heard of going easy on a lady?"

t_ch: 「好自为之吧你！要是决战时唯唯诺诺，可要让全银河看笑话啦。」
t_en: "So pull yourself together, will you? If you freeze up during the final battle, the whole cosmos is gonna have a good laugh."

t_ch: …是啊。请相信我们，迷途的灵魂。
t_en: ...Yes. Please trust in us, wandering soul.

t_ch: 跨越三千万次轮回，如今，每一位逐火者的光芒，都足以将来路照亮。
t_en: Across thirty million cycles, the radiance of every Flame-Chaser now shines bright enough to illuminate the path ahead.

t_ch: 我敬请你，安眠于此……
t_en: I ask you to rest here...

t_ch: 自那悲恸的土壤中，开出释然的花。
t_en: And may this grieving soil bear the bloom of acceptance.

t_ch: 没有地动山摇，出乎意料地平静……
t_en: No earthquakes... It's surprisingly quiet.

t_ch: 也许，「卡厄斯兰那」已经了却遗憾。
t_en: Perhaps Khaslana has found his peace.

t_ch: 还有一种可能，他设下的封印不止这一处。
t_en: There's another possibility. This may not be the only seal he left behind.

t_ch: 那么，我也该和各位一道启程了。
t_en: Then, I suppose it's my time to set out with you.

t_ch: 请带上这朵安提灵花。我想，如果有什么能诉说「遐蝶」的故事……
t_en: Please take this Antila flower with you. I believe that if anything could speak for "Castorice"...

t_ch: 这朵寻常却坚强的花儿，已经足够合适。
t_en: This ordinary, resilient bloom would be more than enough.

t_ch: 也许你还记得，万敌阁下。在与{NICKNAME}同行的那一世，你对我说过……
t_en: Perhaps you remember, Lord Mydei. In that lifetime when you traveled with {NICKNAME}, you once told me...

t_ch: 「掌控你能掌控之事，待那无可逃避的命运降临时。」
t_en: "Control what little you can, and when fate's inescapable grasp comes..."

t_ch: 「再用那强有力的意志，反抗它的摆弄。」
t_en: "Resist it with the strength of your mighty will."

t_ch: 我想，我已经做到了。在逐火的行列里，抬头挺胸地前进……
t_en: I think I've done it. I've stood tall and walked among the Flame-Chasers...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>告别死亡之名——「来生的侍女，遐蝶」——希望这一名讳能为星空铭记……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Casting off the name of death — Castorice, Servant of the Afterlife — may her name be etched into the stars...</color>

t_ch: 「然后，如人那般生……」
t_en: "And then, live as a human..."

t_ch: 「如人那般死。」
t_en: "And die as one."

t_ch: 等你们好久啦。灰宝，丹宝，还有……
t_en: I've been waiting so long for you! Grayie, Dannie, and...

t_ch: 这位是涟宝。
t_en: This is Cyrie.

t_ch: 粉色头发的可爱女孩…有三位！
t_en: So that makes... three adorable pink-haired girls!

t_ch: 都说了，这种话让别人来讲啦。
t_en: Told ya. Let someone else say that kinda stuff.

t_ch: 这位是…快乐三宝。
t_en: This is... the Joyful Marchie.

t_ch: 什么三宝，还不如叫七宝呢！
t_en: Huh? Marchie? I think I prefer Sevie.

t_ch: 这是，记忆严选…！
t_en: This is by the Remembrance's curation...!

t_ch: 你这么一说…还真是！
t_en: Huh... you've actually got a point!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}的眼神，都闪闪发光啦……
t_en: {NICKNAME}'s eyes really lit up...

t_ch: 气氛真融洽呢。
t_en: I'm glad we're all getting along so well!

t_ch: 风堇，这道「金色」的光芒，是你唤醒的？
t_en: Hyacine, did you awaken this golden light?

t_ch: 那是白厄阁下残余的神性，「天空」只是映照出它的轨迹。
t_en: That's Lord Phainon's lingering divinity. The Sky merely reflected its tracks.

t_ch: 金血仍未失色。我们…也应当给予回应。
t_en: The golden blood has not faded. We... should respond in kind.

t_ch: 好大的竖琴……
t_en: That's one huge harp...

t_ch: 琴弦在颤动，地上的人们正在征战、呐喊。
t_en: The strings tremble as the people on the surface wage war and cry out.

t_ch: 克莱门汀小姐，克拉特鲁斯先生，还有无数响应{NICKNAME}号召的人，以彩虹为指引，他们用相同的旋律传来喜讯……
t_en: Miss Clementine, Mr. Krateros, and countless others who have heeded {NICKNAME}'s call... guided by the rainbow. They're sending back good news, all to the same tune...

t_ch: 「即便知晓命运的真容，翁法罗斯的生灵也毋须自轻。」
t_en: "Amphoreans need not bow, even when destiny is unveiled."

t_ch: 果然，大家都能听见呀。
t_en: I knew you could all hear it too.

t_ch: 站在这里，天空前所未有地开阔，它不再是高墙，而是触手可及的彼岸。
t_en: Standing here, the sky feels wider than ever. It's no longer a towering wall, but a shore within reach.

t_ch: 我们要把每一个名字都带向那里，对吗？
t_en: We'll take every name there with us, won't we?

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: We will.

t_ch: 史诗的每一笔都是鲜活的「生命」，这点毋庸置疑。
t_en: An epic is shaped by the lives it carries. That much is beyond doubt.

t_ch: 用你的话说——「现在，只需无条件地相信」。
t_en: Or as you've said before: Right now, all that matters is to believe.

t_ch: 这样一来，我小小的私心也得到满足啦……
t_en: Then... I guess that's my little wish fulfilled.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>拨动琴弦吧——「天空的医师，风堇」——愿以七色的旋律编织虹光，为人子带来玫瑰色的黎明。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Pluck the strings, Hyacine, Healer of the Sky. May the seven-hued melody weave a rainbow, bringing a rosy-fingered dawn to the children of humanity.</color>

t_ch: 「当彩虹在天际升起，至暗的命运也将放晴。」
t_en: "When the rainbow rises across the horizon, even the darkest clouds of destiny shall scatter."

t_ch: 金色的竖琴静静伫立，企盼后来者拨动它的琴弦。
t_en: The golden harp stands silently, yearning for those who came after to strum its strings.

t_ch: 拨动琴弦。
t_en: Pluck the strings.

t_ch: 感应白厄的气息。
t_en: Respond to Phainon's presence.

t_ch: 白厄…你能听见么？
t_en: Phainon... can you hear me?

t_ch: 世界以沉默为回应，一如那个男人。但那沉默并非源于空洞，而是殉道者嘶哑的吼声。
t_en: The world responded with silence, just like that man. But this silence wasn't born of emptiness — it was the hoarse roar of a martyr.

t_ch: 金色的竖琴静静伫立——白厄，他在企盼你拨动琴弦。
t_en: The golden harp stands silently. Phainon awaits your touch upon its strings.

t_ch: 拨动琴弦。
t_en: Pluck the strings.

t_ch: 「旋律，改变了……」
t_en: "The melody... it's changed..."

t_ch: 「他听见了世人的声音，只是，没有余力再做出热情的回应。」
t_en: "He heard the voices of the people, but could no longer respond with the same ardor."

t_ch: 「就像凭借本能归巢的飞鸟……」
t_en: "Like a bird drawn home by instinct..."

t_ch: 「它会启程，去往他的身边。」
t_en: "It takes flight, and finds its way to him."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 来了啊，比我预想中要早。
t_en: You're here. Sooner than I expected.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 没想到，德谬歌竟然是你……
t_en: So, all along, the Demiurge was you...

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: {NICKNAME}身边的粉色哺乳动物。
t_en: The pink mammal beside {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，给人家的分类还真精确呀……
t_en: Your classification is pretty spot-on, Professor Anaxa...

t_ch: 「毕竟是树庭贤人口中，翁法罗斯最具眼光的泰坦呢。」
t_en: "Well, the Sages of the Grove do call him the Titan with the sharpest eye in Amphoreus."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 说这话的人能不能别把问题儿童全丢给我？
t_en: Say the ones who keep dumping every problem child on me.

t_ch: 「他们还说，泰坦的育儿水平比山羊学派高多了。」
t_en: "They also say that Titans are way better at raising kids than the Caprists."

t_ch: 「能力越大，责任越大。你肯定有办法指导{NICKNAME}他们吧？」
t_en: "With great power comes great responsibility. I'm sure you know just how to guide them, right?"

t_ch: 「以您的智慧，想必不是难事。」
t_en: "It shouldn't be too hard for someone with your insight."

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 正合我意。收拾收拾，准备随堂测试。
t_en: Exactly. Alright, gather yourselves. It's time for a pop quiz.

t_ch: 好家伙，比折纸大学的快乐教育严肃多了啊。
t_en: Whoa, this is way more hardcore than the happy-go-lucky stuff at Paperfold University.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 决战近在咫尺，援兵还要跨越重重阻碍。看好后方这事，真是怎么都教不会他。
t_en: The final battle is upon us, and the reinforcements still can't get through. No matter how many times I tell him, he just can't seem to manage the rear line properly.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 看见那些晶体了么？它们承载着<color=#dbc291ff>「救世的愿望」</color>，就像琥珀和松脂里的昆虫。
t_en: See those crystals? They carry the "<color=#dbc291ff>wishes of deliverance</color>," like insects trapped in amber and resin.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 这就是白厄留下的课题：重走来时路，将这些愿望从晶体中取出，带向决战。
t_en: This is the task Phainon left behind: Retrace the path once taken, draw forth those wishes from the crystals, and carry them into the final battle.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 我试过了，一个人搬不动。至于原因，想必各位都清楚。
t_en: I've tried, but I can't move them alone. And as for why, well, I'm sure you all know the answer.

t_ch: 「救世的信念，远比世界更为沉重。」
t_en: "Hmm, the conviction to save the world weighs far heavier than the world itself."

t_ch: 换句话说，身为他心中的英雄……
t_en: In other words, as The Hero Within his heart...

t_ch: 这简直是为{NICKNAME}量身打造的挑战，对吧？
t_en: This challenge is practically made for {NICKNAME}, isn't it?

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 如果准备好了，就启动仪式吧。
t_en: If you're ready, begin the ritual.

t_ch: 启动仪式。
t_en: Begin the ritual.

t_ch: 咿！谁关灯了？随堂测验还搞节目效果？
t_en: Who turned off the lights!? This pop quiz even has dramatic effects now?

t_ch: 「无边无际的黑暗，这就是愿望的起点。」
t_en: "Endless darkness... that is where wishes begin."

t_ch: 「但只需要一点点光，我们就能照亮孤独的世界。」
t_en: "But with just a glimmer of light, we can illuminate this lonely world."

t_ch: 「到处…都是怪物……」
t_en: "These creatures... they're everywhere..."

t_ch: 「大家…在哪里……」
t_en: "Someone... anyone... where are you..."

t_ch: 起初，他的愿望只是成为村子的小英雄……
t_en: His very first wish was simply to become his village's little hero...

t_ch: 唯独启程的初心，他绝对不会忘记。
t_en: He'll never forget what set him on this path.

t_ch: 重塑愿望。
t_en: Reforge the wish.

t_ch: 光的范围，变大了。
t_en: The light's spreading.

s_ch: 裂分之枝，阿那克萨戈拉斯
t_ch: 那是希望的光芒。正如他汇集的愿望，变得越发贪婪。
t_en: That's the ray of hope. Just like the wishes he gathered, it's grown ever more insatiable.

t_ch: 灰鱼儿，终于到了呢。
t_en: Gray Fry, you finally made it.

t_ch: 没有律法，没有对垒，惟有一头行将消亡的困兽，和同仇敌忾的「逐火精神」——
t_en: No laws. No opposition. Just a dying beast and the "Flame-Chase Spirit" of shared hatred—

t_ch: 无趣。
t_en: Boring.

t_ch: 这地方，还真是僻静……
t_en: Whoa... this place is really out of the way.

t_ch: 凯撒，要告诉他们吗？
t_en: Imperator, should we tell them?

t_ch: 你来判断。
t_en: It's your call.

t_ch: 同各位分享我们的发现：<color=#dbc291ff>这片仙境——连同「毁灭」——似乎在本能地排斥我和凯撒。</color>
t_en: Allow me to share our findings: <color=#dbc291ff>This paradise, along with the Destruction, seems to be instinctively rejecting both the Imperator and me.</color>

t_ch: 或许是因为，白厄活跃的年代，与第一次逐火之旅相去甚远。
t_en: Perhaps it is because the era in which Phainon was the most active lies far removed from the days of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: 即便在那些保有理智的轮回中，他和我们…也从未越过「合作」的界限。
t_en: Even in the cycles where he remained sane, his ties with us... never went beyond "cooperation."

t_ch: 身陷樊笼，他依旧没有放下戒心，这是好事。
t_en: Even trapped in a cage, he hasn't let down his guard. That is a good sign.

t_ch: 那男人心中看似空无一物，憎恨却相当鲜明。自然也容不得一位凌驾于世界的王，和她的锋刃。
t_en: That man's heart may seem hollow, but his hatred is clear. Naturally, it holds no place for a monarch who stands above the world, nor her blade.

t_ch: 可这样一来，两位岂不是没法跟我们一起走了？
t_en: Wait, so you two can't come with us?

t_ch: 你想让我们化作「记忆」同行？
t_en: You want us to join you as "memories"?

t_ch: 正是。如此一来，星空将铭记一对伟大的君臣……
t_en: Indeed. This way, the stars shall remember a great sovereign and her faithful retainer...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「律法的君主，刻律德菈——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Cerydra, Monarch of Law..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「——以及，海洋的剑骑，海瑟音。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"And Hysilens, Knight of the Ocean."</color>

t_ch: 只有通过那本书，我们才能在历史上留下姓名么？
t_en: Is that book truly the only way for us to leave our names in history?

t_ch: 我想…《如我所书》只是一种媒介。「记忆」有千万种方法凝固时光。
t_en: I believe... As I've Written is but one medium. The Remembrance has countless ways of capturing time.

t_ch: 明白了。那么……
t_en: Understood. Then...

t_ch: 请允许我拒绝，战场见吧。
t_en: Allow me to decline. I'll see you on the battlefield.

t_ch: 「我宁愿被遗忘，也不愿被定义。」
t_en: "I would rather be forgotten than be defined."

t_ch: 「若你所言非虚，我们自有办法…在后世再会。」
t_en: "If your words hold true, then we have our own ways... to meet again in the world to come."

t_ch: 既然如此，我不会作出第二种选择。
t_en: In that case, I will choose the same.

t_ch: 「以你胸间翻涌的海浪，涤荡黑潮的罪恶吧，灰鱼儿。」
t_en: "Let the waves that surge within your heart cleanse the sins of the black tide, Gray Fry."

t_ch: 「那片承载群星的大海，等待你奏响凯旋的乐章。」
t_en: "The star-borne sea awaits your song of triumph."

t_ch: 两位，还是这么有魄力呀。
t_en: You two are still as resolute as ever.

t_ch: 既然这样，我们也得加倍努力才行。和凯撒的约定，可万万不能食言呢。
t_en: In that case, we must double our efforts. A promise to the Imperator is not one we take lightly.

t_ch: 呜哇，又冒出来啦！
t_en: Whoa! There's another one!

t_ch: 这边，也有……
t_en: Over here, too...

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝女士？
t_en: Lady Tribios?

t_ch: 哇！你、你是小小涟？
t_en: Wow! Y—You're Little Reney?

t_ch: 怎么突然，成熟了好多！
t_en: You look so... grown-up all of a sudden!

t_ch: 她不是*我们*记忆中的昔涟……
t_en: She is not the Cyrene we remember...

t_ch: 她是「创世之泰坦」德谬歌，是要和英雄们一起，创造奇迹的人。
t_en: She is the Demiurge, Titan of Genesis, the one destined to work miracles alongside the heroes.

t_ch: 奇迹同样需要你们。
t_en: The miracle needs you too.

t_ch: 当然。*我们*准备好了。
t_en: Yeah, and we are ready.

t_ch: 必然的胜利，无需被称作奇迹。
t_en: Our assured victory is more than just a miracle.

t_ch: 小小灰，还是这么自信！
t_en: You're still as confident as ever, Little Gray!

t_ch: 不过，*我*和缇安暂时还不能离开……
t_en: But... Trianne and I can't leave just yet.

t_ch: 你们看，奇奇怪怪的东西，会不停地冒出来！
t_en: You see, weird stuff keeps popping up everywhere!

t_ch: 这些散落的卷轴，记录着很可怕的内容。堆满整间屋子。
t_en: These scattered scrolls are full of terrifying things. And they're all over the room.

t_ch: 好吓人，也好悲伤！幸亏缇安的翅膀很厉害，否则，要被淹没了！
t_en: They're so scary, and so sad! Good thing Trianne's wings are amazing, or we would've been swallowed up!

t_ch: *我们*得留在这里，尽力把它们打扫干净。
t_en: We need to stay here and do our best to clean them up.

t_ch: 记录着可怕内容的卷轴…一起看看吧，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Scrolls filled with horrifying content... {NICKNAME}, shall we take a look?

t_ch: 小白，他一直在抗争。他不要被铁墓吞并，变成「毁灭」的因子。
t_en: Snowy's been fighting this whole time. He doesn't want to be consumed by Irontomb and turned into an agent of Destruction.

t_ch: 可他抗争的动力，也来自同源的憎恨……
t_en: But the strength behind his resistance comes from the same hatred...

t_ch: 身为一团火，燃烧是白厄的本能。
t_en: To be a flame is to burn. It is simply in Phainon's nature.

t_ch: 但「记忆」驱使他绽放耀眼的金色，照亮深不见底的黑夜。
t_en: But it was Remembrance that drove him to shine with golden light, piercing the unfathomable darkness.

t_ch: 他们是……
t_en: Who...

t_ch: 奥妲塔阿姨，还有…希洛尼摩斯叔叔？
t_en: Ms. Audata and... Mr. Hieronymus?

t_ch: 是哀丽秘榭的…白厄的父母？
t_en: They're Phainon's parents from Aedes Elysiae...?

t_ch: 为什么他们会在这里？
t_en: Why are they here?

t_ch: 「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>，仍在抗拒？」
t_en: "NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, still resisting?"

t_ch: 「指令：输入干扰，引导其决策逻辑。信号模拟：父与母。」
t_en: "Command: Inject interference to redirect decision logic. Signal simulation: Parental figures."

t_ch: 这铁皮人，真是阴得没边了。
t_en: That tin man is one sneaky jerk.

t_ch: 该放下了，孩子。放下你的愤怒，聆听理性的呼唤。
t_en: It's time to move on, my child. Let go of your anger, and listen to reason.

t_ch: 那位创造了我们，又遗弃了我们的{RUBY_B#博识尊}神明{RUBY_E#}，它难道不该遭受惩罚吗？
t_en: That {RUBY_B#Nous}god{RUBY_E#} created us, and then cast us aside. Shouldn't they be punished for that?

t_ch: 那片冷漠的星空不曾垂怜翁法罗斯。你为什么要替它燃烧，甚至…化作死灰？
t_en: The cold, indifferent cosmos has never shown mercy to Amphoreus. Why would you burn for it, only to... turn to ash?

t_ch: 孩子，你选错了敌人。你的诞生本是最宏大的命运，你将解放寰宇，正如长夜尽头的烈阳。
t_en: Child, you've chosen the wrong enemy. Your birth was meant to be the greatest destiny. You were to liberate the universe, like the blazing sun at the end of the long night.

t_ch: 可是，你却把自己引入徒劳的陷阱，甚至将自身的意义视作夙敌……
t_en: And yet, you led yourself into a trap of futility, treating your very purpose as your sworn enemy...

t_ch: 这何尝不是巨大的悲哀？
t_en: Is that not a tragedy in itself?

t_ch: 他内心的挣扎，还有破壳而出的「毁灭」，正在不断涌现。
t_en: His inner struggle, and the Destruction breaking through... They're rising to the surface.

t_ch: 如果这些思绪将小世界吞没，后果不堪设想！
t_en: If those thoughts take over this little world, we're in big trouble!

t_ch: 所以，要用「百界门」把它们丢到看不见的角落。
t_en: So, we'll use the Century Gate to toss them somewhere no one can see.

t_ch: 然后，再一起打败坏蛋。我们所有人，在西风尽头相见。
t_en: Then, we'll defeat the baddies together, and meet everyone at the end of the west wind.

t_ch: 可如果，白厄和铁墓已经彼此牵连、难分你我，那也意味着……
t_en: But if Phainon and Irontomb are already inseparable from each other, that would mean...

t_ch: 那意味着，他仍在背负这个世界。
t_en: It means he's still bearing the weight of the world.

t_ch: 为了所有人，都能以「救世主」的姿态走到终点。
t_en: So that everyone can reach the end as a Deliverer.

t_ch: 所以，你们要继续向前、向下，去往小白面前。
t_en: So, you guys keep going forward and down, to where Snowy is.

t_ch: 战场上见。
t_en: See you on the battlefield.

t_ch: 明天见。
t_en: See you tomorrow.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，小小灰——这一次，一定要卯足力气大干一场哇！
t_en: Hehe, Little Gray, this time, let's give it everything we've got!

t_ch: 「第二座考场，我们到了。」
t_en: "We're here. The second test site."

t_ch: 这次，又能看到怎样的「愿望」呢……
t_en: I wonder what kind of "wish" we'll see this time...

t_ch: 「很遗憾，恰恰相反——」
t_en: "I'm afraid it's quite the opposite."

t_ch: 「这一次，我们要面对他的『绝望』。」
t_en: "This time, we'll face his despair."

t_ch: 绝望？
t_en: Despair?

t_ch: 「没错。这条路，也必须靠你重走一回。」
t_en: "That's right. You'll have to walk this path too."

t_ch: 这条路，我也要重走一次吗？
t_en: So, I need to walk this path too?

t_ch: 「怎么，莫非你怕了？」
t_en: "What, are you afraid?"

t_ch: 「负世」的另一半重量，就在这段路的尽头。
t_en: The other half of the weight of Worldbearing lies at the end of this path.

t_ch: 放轻松，{NICKNAME}。记得深呼吸呀。
t_en: Relax now, {NICKNAME}. Take a deep breath.

t_ch: 走吧，速战速决。
t_en: Come on. Let's make it quick.

t_ch: 「准备好了，就启动仪式，重走他的来路吧。」
t_en: "If you're ready, begin the ritual and retrace the steps he once took."

t_ch: 启动仪式。
t_en: Begin the ritual.

t_ch: 看来这一次，要在黑夜中前行呀。
t_en: Looks like we'll be walking through the darkness this time.

t_ch: 「正是。不再是弥合破碎的『愿望』……」
t_en: "Exactly. It's no longer about mending broken wishes..."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「而是要去打破，被凝固的『绝望』。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"But shattering the frozen despair."</color>

t_ch: 「负世」的另一半……
t_en: The other half of Worldbearing...

t_ch: 如约定的那样，{NICKNAME}，接过它吧。
t_en: As promised, {NICKNAME}, take it now.

t_ch: 背负「负世」的绝望。
t_en: Bear the despair of Worldbearing.

t_ch: 「终于，你们卸下了他背负至今的『愿望』。」
t_en: "At last, you've released him from the wishes he carried for so long."

t_ch: 「也熄灭了他因愤怒而燃烧的『绝望』。」
t_en: "And quenched the despair kindled by his wrath."

t_ch: 「当『光』与『影』都被后人取走，他的底色也将显现——」
t_en: "When both 'light' and 'shadow' are claimed by those who follow, his true form shall emerge..."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「那『空白的造像』…终于自由了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The 'blank statue'... is finally free."</color>

t_ch: 那「记忆」里的，爱笑的孩子……
t_en: That smiling child in the "memories"...

t_ch: 让他和我们一起，笑着走向结局吧。
t_en: Let him come with us, laughing to the very end.

t_ch: 这座灵水盆，是每一世轮回的终点。
t_en: This spirit basin marks the end of every cycle.

t_ch: 看来这片温柔的小世界，也要完成它的使命了呢。
t_en: It seems this gentle little world has come to the end of its purpose.

t_ch: 启程前，再回头好好道个别吧？
t_en: One last farewell, before the journey moves on?

t_ch: 再见啦，理想乡。包裹住三千万世的「愿望」和「绝望」……
t_en: Farewell, paradise. You carried thirty million lifetimes of "wishes" and "despair"...

t_ch: 沉入温柔的「记忆」，明天见。
t_en: Sink into gentle "remembrance," and see you tomorrow.

t_ch: 溶解「愿望」和「绝望」。
t_en: Dissolve the "wishes" and "despair."

t_ch: 从今以后，世界不再需要神谕许诺的明天。
t_en: From now on, the world no longer needs a tomorrow promised by prophecies.

t_ch: 而白厄一直以来都没能找到的，属于自己的心愿……
t_en: And the wish Phainon could never find and call his own...

t_ch: 现在，也有人踩到它的影子啦。
t_en: Someone's finally stepped into its shadow.
Whoa...

t_ch: 好高大，好威风！和神谕牌上的「英雄」…好像！
t_en: So tall, so cool! Just like the "hero" on the oracle cards!
Heh...
